actions.value:
The process to sell Bitcoin is as follows:
 

  1. Tap the "Sell" tab to get to the sell screen
  2. Select the correct region at the top of the screen
  3. Tap on the payment method you would like to use
  4. Tap on the wallet that has the currency you wish to sell (your BTC wallet)
  5. Enter the amount that you wish to sell
  6. Select the exchange you would like to use for this order (Edge will default to the exchange with the best rate)
  7. Tap "Next" and you will be directed to the exchange website to complete the order
  8. Once on the exchange site, you will need to login with your email
  9. Next you will verify your identity with the exchange (note: this only needs to be done once when you use this exchange for the first time)
  10. Then you will connect your payment method to the exchange account
  11. Lastly, complete the sell order and "slide to confirm" in Edge
